source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Usul is building the “Amazon for Government”, a world where any company can sell to any government in a few clicks on their computer. Anything from national security tech, space stations, energy infrastructure, healthcare and more.



Our AI platform helps companies identify, pursue, and win the government opportunities they’re most likely to convert and makes it dramatically easier for governments to buy from the private sector.



In 1 year we’ve grown to $5M+ ARR securing Fortune 500 government contractors, the U.S. government and NATO as customers. We’re now entering the next phase of growth to capture the entire U.S. market and expand to over 60+ allied nations.



We’re building a small, elite team with high standards and low ego. We care about doing whatever it takes, getting better at the craft every week, and being genuinely fun to work with. We’re the youngest team in our world by far. We’re in our 20s running around defense conferences in Usul t-shirts, surrounded by 40 to 60 year olds in suits and military uniforms. People see us as the ambitious AI builders bringing real Silicon Valley energy and modern technology to one of the most traditional industries on earth.



We are looking for a Founding AE who is excited about building the sales motion that will transform how the best technology is adopted by Allied Nations around the world. In this role, you'll work closely with our CEO and founding AEs to fly to conferences, prospect, run discovery, navigate stakeholders, manage procurement, close, and expand accounts. If you want a clean territory and a mature playbook, this is not that. If you want to build, move fast, and win big deals that keep our world safe, keep reading.


What You Will Work On:

 - Own the full sales cycle from conference hopping, prospecting, closing and expanding deals that can hit 6-7 figure ACVs

 - Build relationships with government contractors in military hubs like DC, San Diego, Huntsville and Tampa who've never bought AI software

 - Work with our CEO to develop our sales playbook and sales org culture

 - Navigate complex enterprise buying processes with engineering-led decision makers and procurement teams

 - Build and manage our sales systems, CRM, and growth infrastructure from the ground up. you'll own our entire sales tech stack.

 - Lead high-impact conversations with CEOs and business development leaders at companies building critical defense technology




ABOUT THE INTERVIEW

 1. Intro Call (15 min)

 2. Founder Culture Call (15-30 min) - In Person if you are in SF!

 3. Sales Technical (2 hours)

 4. 2-3 day Work Trial

 5. Offer!

source_jobs.title: Capture Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT USUL

Usul is building the “Amazon for Government”, a world where any company can sell to any government in a few clicks on their computer. Anything from national security tech, space stations, energy infrastructure, healthcare and more.



Our AI platform helps companies identify, pursue, and win the government opportunities they’re most likely to convert and makes it dramatically easier for governments to buy from the private sector.



In 1 year we’ve grown to $5M+ ARR securing Fortune 500 government contractors, the U.S. Army and NATO as customers. We’re now entering the next phase of growth to capture the entire U.S. market and expand to over 60+ allied nations.



We’re building a small, elite team with high standards and low ego. We care about doing whatever it takes, getting better at the craft every week, and being genuinely fun to work with. We’re the youngest team in our world by far. We’re in our 20s running around defense conferences in Usul t-shirts, surrounded by 40 to 60 year olds in suits and military uniforms. People see us as the ambitious AI builders bringing real Silicon Valley energy and modern technology to one of the most traditional industries on earth.




WE’RE LOOKING FOR A SCRAPPY GOVERNMENT CONTRACTING EXPERT WHO’S READY TO ERADICATE THE TOOLS THEY’VE BEEN FORCED TO USE.

You’ll leverage your capture expertise to revolutionize how every government contractor wins business.




WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Drive customer success through credibility. When you advise Fortune 500 defense companies on transforming their capture process, they'll listen—because you've sat in their chairs. You know the pain of mining SAM.gov http://SAM.gov at 2am, wrestling with outdated CRM systems, and watching winnable opportunities slip away.

 - Champion product adoption in the world's most risk-averse and archaic industry. Lead onboardings, pilots, and enterprise rollouts at major defense primes with our customer deployment teams. Your expertise helps customers see past "this is how we've always done it" to envision what's possible with Usul.

 - Be the internal voice of the user that bridges our product and complex government contracting. Your firsthand experience of this data and government contracting workflows will inform everything from customer deployments to product roadmaps to engineering priorities.


WHAT WE LOOK FOR:

 - You have 1-5 years of experience with government contracts, budget tracking, proposal writing, lobbying etc. but you’ve always been pissed with the legacy tools and way things have worked forever

 - Maybe you worked at a prime contractor or a government consultant and have seen the processes for how defense companies win new business end-to-end

 - You know how BD/Capture people think and you’re fired up to revolutionize the way they work

 - You are tech forward, use AI on a daily basis (don’t have to know how to code) → just familiar with the frontier technology and excited to implement it within these legacy defense enterprises

source_jobs.title: Deployment Strategist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT USUL

Usul is building the “Amazon for Government”, a world where any company can sell to any government in a few clicks on their computer. Anything from national security tech, space stations, energy infrastructure, healthcare and more.



Our AI platform helps companies identify, pursue, and win the government opportunities they’re most likely to convert and makes it dramatically easier for governments to buy from the private sector.



In 1 year we’ve grown to $5M+ ARR securing Fortune 500 government contractors, the U.S. Army and NATO as customers. We’re now entering the next phase of growth to capture the entire U.S. market and expand to over 60+ allied nations.



We’re building a small, elite team with high standards and low ego. We care about doing whatever it takes, getting better at the craft every week, and being genuinely fun to work with. We’re the youngest team in our world by far. We’re in our 20s running around defense conferences in Usul t-shirts, surrounded by 40 to 60 year olds in suits and military uniforms. People see us as the ambitious AI builders bringing real Silicon Valley energy and modern technology to one of the most traditional industries on earth.




WE ARE LOOKING FOR AN ENTREPRENEURIAL OPERATOR TO OWN OUR CUSTOMER DEPLOYMENTS.

You'll be on the front lines to ensure Usul becomes the AI partner for every defense company and leave them with the thought - "how did we ever work without Usul?"




WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Serve as the deployment lead of Usul for a portfolio of some of the largest and fastest growing defense and space companies in the world, owning all post-sale relationships from onboarding/training, enterprise adoption, expansion and renewals.

 - Coordinate complex product onboarding paths from defense-tech startups building in their garage to Fortune 500 companies with thousands of employees ensuring every single user maximizes Usul’s value to transform the way they win defense contracts.

 - Lead commercial upsell/cross-sell expansions within every account.

 - Own customer health using metrics on your accounts to increase retention, reduce churn and close renewals.

 - Collaborate with Sales, Product and Engineering directly influencing our product roadmap and path to revolutionizing how every allied government and defense company interact.


WHAT WE LOOK FOR:

 - 1-3 years of consulting/strategy experience with big, old industries. You know how to navigate these rooms of C suites and pitch ROI. (McKinsey, Bain, BCG preferred)

 - Optional plus: Experience leading software deployments in large businesses.

 - Crazy high agency and ability to context switch extremely fast.

 - Willingness to travel 1-2 times per month for client engagements.

 - Entrepreneurial experience and mindset - you are excited about building things from scratch and are able to identify issues and execute quickly.

 - High EQ.

 - In office forward - we move insanely fast 5 days per week in San Francisco.

source_jobs.title: Chief of Staff
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT USUL

Usul is building the “Amazon for Government”, a world where any company can sell to any government in a few clicks on their computer. Anything from national security tech, space stations, energy infrastructure, healthcare and more.



Our AI platform helps companies identify, pursue, and win the government opportunities they’re most likely to convert and makes it dramatically easier for governments to buy from the private sector.



In 1 year we’ve grown to $5M+ ARR securing Fortune 500 government contractors, the U.S. government and NATO as customers. We’re now entering the next phase of growth to capture the entire U.S. market and expand to over 60+ allied nations.



We’re building a small, elite team with high standards and low ego. We care about doing whatever it takes, getting better at the craft every week, and being genuinely fun to work with. We’re the youngest team in our world by far. We’re in our 20s running around defense conferences in Usul t-shirts, surrounded by 40 to 60 year olds in suits and military uniforms. People see us as the ambitious AI builders bringing real Silicon Valley energy and modern technology to one of the most traditional industries on earth.




ABOUT THE ROLE

This role is responsible for designing, building, and executing on the strategic projects that will enable us to hit escape velocity and hyper scale globally connecting every company and government. This is a crazy opportunity for an early career operator/entrepreneur to sit at the center of how to scale a company from early growth stage to IPO.



You’ll help shape strategy, build operational systems from scratch and act as force multiplier with the founders to improve all aspects of the company.




WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Own the operating rhythm of the company including stand-ups, offsites, planning cycles, and the connective tissue that keeps a fast-moving team executing in sync

 - Be the CEO's right hand on go-to-market strategy, turning high-level bets into structured plans with owners, timelines, and outcomes

 - Design and execute our global conference and GTM calendar, putting Usul in the right rooms with the right people across the U.S. and 60+ allied nations

 - Vibe-code internal tools and AI-powered workflows to eliminate operational drag and keep us running lean

 - Drive cross-functional execution across sales, product, engineering, and deployment so nothing falls through the cracks as the team 3x's in size

 - Build and run RevOps across our commercial and federal businesses




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 1-5 years of past Chief of Staff/Operating experience

 - Scrappy entrepreneur mindset, bias to action

 - Willingness to move to sf and open to travel

 - Thrives in ambiguity, we don’t have everything figured out - needs to be able to operate in the grey

 - See something do something mindset, team player




ABOUT THE INTERVIEW

 - 15-minute screening with Joon (CTO) or Oliver (CPO)

 - 30-minute Culture Fit with Jarren (CEO)

 - On-site work trial in San Francisco

 - Offer!

source_jobs.title: Head of Growth
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT USUL

Usul is building the “Amazon for Government”, a world where any company can sell to any government in a few clicks on their computer. Anything from national security tech, space stations, energy infrastructure, healthcare and more.



Our AI platform helps companies identify, pursue, and win the government opportunities they’re most likely to convert and makes it dramatically easier for governments to buy from the private sector.



In 1 year we’ve grown to $5M+ ARR securing Fortune 500 government contractors, the U.S. government and NATO as customers. We’re now entering the next phase of growth to capture the entire U.S. market and expand to over 60+ allied nations.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re build a small, elite team with high standards and low ego. We care about doing whatever it takes, getting better at the craft every week, and being genuinely fun to work with. We’re the youngest team in our world by far. We’re in our 20s running around defense conferences in Usul t-shirts, surrounded by 40 to 60 year olds in suits and military uniforms. People see us as the ambitious AI builders bringing real Silicon Valley energy and modern technology to one of the most traditional industries on earth.



As our Head of Growth you will be the fuel on the fire to help scale the team to IPO globally. You'll build the systems, campaigns, and experiments that turn Usul's momentum into a growth machine.



What you will be doing:

 - Build and own Usul's full-stack growth infrastructure: outbound and inbound orchestration systems that drive awareness and pipeline across both commercial and government buyers

 - Architect and run outbound engines using tools like Clay, Amplemarket, and Apollo, from list building and enrichment to sequencing and personalization at scale

 - Build inbound orchestration workflows using tools like Default to capture, route, and convert interest from the web, events, and content into qualified pipeline

 - Own and continuously optimize landing pages and conversion flows for both commercial and .gov audiences, tailoring messaging to each buyer's world

 - Lead SEO end-to-end: keyword research, programmatic pages, content strategy, and on-page optimization targeting government acquisition and defense tech buyers

 - Partner closely with product, design, and engineering to align growth efforts with where the product is heading

 - Vibe-code internal tools and automations to eliminate manual work and move faster

What we're looking for:

 - 3–5 years in a growth or GTM role at an early-stage AI or B2B SaaS startup

 - Hands-on experience building outbound engines in Clay, Amplemarket, Apollo, or equivalent — you've done it yourself, not just managed someone who did

 - Proven track record standing up inbound orchestration and SEO optimization systems that turn interest into pipeline

 - Strong analytical chops: funnels, attribution, and the metrics that matter across a complex B2B deal

 - High-ownership operator who builds systems, not just campaigns

 - Comfortable vibe-coding experiments and automations without waiting on engineering

 - Bias to action, thrives in ambiguity, and genuinely excited about national security and defense tech




ABOUT THE INTERVIEW

 1. Intro Call (15 min)

 2. Founder Culture Call (15-30 min) - In Person if you are in SF!

 3. GTM Technical (45 mins)

 4. 2-3 day Work Trial

 5. Offer!

source_jobs.title: Fullstack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT USUL

Usul is building the “Amazon for Government”, a world where any company can sell to any government in a few clicks on their computer. Anything from national security tech, space stations, energy infrastructure, healthcare and more.



Our AI platform helps companies identify, pursue, and win the government opportunities they’re most likely to convert and makes it dramatically easier for governments to buy from the private sector.



In 1 year we’ve grown to $5M+ ARR securing Fortune 500 government contractors, the U.S. government and NATO as customers. We’re now entering the next phase of growth to capture the entire U.S. market and expand to over 60+ allied nations.



We’re building a small, elite team with high standards and low ego. We care about doing whatever it takes, getting better at the craft every week, and being genuinely fun to work with. We’re the youngest team in our world by far. We’re in our 20s running around defense conferences in Usul t-shirts, surrounded by 40 to 60 year olds in suits and military uniforms. People see us as the ambitious AI builders bringing real Silicon Valley energy and modern technology to one of the most traditional industries on earth.


These governments put out a firehose of contract data every day in 40+ languages: what they've bought and what they need next. You'll be a Full Stack Engineer to build the pipelines that make this data actionable, helping customers from scrappy startups to massive enterprises win contracts and helping governments find the best capabilities faster.



Who we’re looking for

 - Knows how to build AI Agents and utilize LLMs effectively

 - Has confidence to present to (and get roasted by) our customers

 - Works in-person at our San Francisco office

 - Has passion for solving mission-critical national security problems

 - Builds intuitive UIs with React & NextJS

 - Use Python

 - Is willing to learn and iterate quickly
   


ABOUT THE INTERVIEW

 - 15-minute screening with Joon (CTO) or Oliver (CPO)

 - 30-minute Culture Fit with Jarren (CEO)

 - 3-hour Technical Interview with Joon (CTO)

 - On-site at San Francisco

 - Offer!
